---
title: "Unrefereed Course Notes"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)

note_entries <- c("Title", "Author", "Subject", "Pages", "University", "Contact", "Abstract")

note_data <- c("Foundations of Mathematics", "Hildebrant, John A.", "foundations", "20", "Louisiana State University", "", "Topics include sets and relations, the Peano axioms, order relations, the axiom of choice, finite and infinite sets, well-ordered sets, quotient sets and the integers, the real numbers, ordinal numbers, and cardinal numbers.")


tibble(note_entries, note_data) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_align(align = "left") |>
  tab_style(
    style= cell_text(v_align = "top"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_options( table.width = "80%", column_labels.hidden = TRUE)  


```
- [Download File](./foundations-of-mathematics_hildebrant.pdf)

This course guide was donated to a collection originally gathered by MathNerds. The author retains copyright. You are free to use these materials for your classes.
